performance_overview: Through 10 sessions (inception 2026-06-01) Bull has completed 4 signal-bucketed trades with ZERO clean signal-driven wins: 06-04 MPC long (-0.25%, stopped ~1 min after entry on a too-tight ultra-low-ATR stop), 06-04 MPC EOD leg (-0.61%), 06-10 CIEN long (-1.68%, failed-bounce stop-out ~21 min in), and TODAY 06-12 WDC long (-0.41%, stopped ~98 SECONDS after entry on the same low-ATR hair-trigger). The only positive realized line ever was the 06-05 +0.54% corrective buy-to-cover of the unintended -18 MPC short -- not a real signal win. Win-rate buckets remain pure noise (all <10 samples). Today Bull finished -$18.58 / -0.0186% while SPY gained +0.39%, so -0.41% relative on the day. Cumulative since inception: Bull -0.0952% vs SPY -2.3638% -- still ahead by ~2.27pts, but today's stop-out converted the long-awaited 'lean-in on the green day' attempt into another small loss, confirming the realized edge is still selectivity/cash-preservation, not trade execution. Trend over last 5 sessions: 4 flat no-trade days then today's single small losing trade.
overnight_hold_insights: Still ZERO genuine overnight holds completed across all 10 sessions. The overnight_holds.closed_eod bucket now reads 4 trades / 1W / 25.0% / avg -0.54%, but is fully contaminated -- every entry has been closed or stopped intraday/EOD (MPC long, MPC EOD leg, CIEN stop, WDC stop), none a real carry-overnight outcome, and the lone 'win' is the corrective short-cover. No gap-risk carry data exists yet. Today WDC was correctly NOT carried: it failed the safe-hold gates anyway (trailing stop never activated, close 564.38 below EMA-21 565.65, RSI faded to 41.5) but had already self-stopped at 12:37 PM. Carry policy unchanged: apply the 6 safe-hold gates (profitable, trailing stop active, price>EMA-21, no earnings within 2 days, sentiment not negative, 5% gap-risk cushion). Standing lesson reinforced: low-ATR names that don't extend within the session are stopped/scratched, not carried.

Calm-VIX-but-flat-SPY backdrop favors selectivity over leaning in.
notes_for_next_session: FOR THE MON 2026-06-15 10:15 AM ENTRY AGENT: (a) BOOK IS FLAT -- zero open positions, no overnight holds. Equity ~$99,904.75, cash ~$99.9k, dtc 0, not PDT, not blocked. VIX low/benign at 16.64 (no vol stress, no no_trade flag). (d) CRITICAL ENTRY LESSON (3-peat): low-ATR stop hair-trigger has now stopped MPC/CIEN/WDC within minutes purely on noise. Before any entry, check atr_pct -- if < ~0.30%, widen the stop floor (min stop distance ~max(1.5xATR, 0.6-0.8% of price)) or size down/skip. ONDS at $9.34 is the only sub-$10 name (different risk profile). (e) RECONCILE BUG still unfixed: if any stop fills before you run, reconcile broker order history into trade_log.jsonl BEFORE update_memory. (f) BOTTOM LINE: calm VIX but flat/down SPY + weak single-name catalysts = default to selectivity/cash discipline; the cumulative edge (+~2.27pts vs SPY) is still cash preservation, not execution. -- ORIGINAL FRIDAY EOD NOTES (for reference): (a) BOOK IS FLAT -- zero open positions, no overnight holds. Account equity ~$99,904.77, cash ~$95.4k, dtc 0, not PDT, not blocked. Earnings blacklist empty as of Friday (REFRESH IT -- new week, check for names reporting Mon/Tue). (b) TODAY'S KEY LESSON -- LOW-ATR STOP HAIR-TRIGGER IS NOW A 3-PEAT: WDC was a clean 7/7 mechanical qualifier (RSI 63.98, rel_vol 1.05, MACD hist rising, EMA9>EMA21, >EMA200, +0.95% over VWAP) yet was stopped out 98 SECONDS after the 12:35 PM entry, filled $561.41 vs $561.53 stop, -$18.58/-0.41%. Its atr_pct was only ~0.17%, so the 1.5xATR stop sat just ~0.4%/$2.20 below entry -- INSIDE routine post-entry noise. This is the SAME failure as MPC 06-04 (stopped ~1 min in, atr ultra-low). PATTERN: 3 of 4 lifetime entries were knocked out within minutes purely on stop-too-tight, not thesis failure. ACTIONABLE: when evaluating entries Monday, treat atr_pct < ~0.30% as a yellow flag -- either widen the stop floor (e.g. a minimum stop distance of max(1.5xATR, ~0.6-0.8% of price)) or size down/skip, because the mechanical qualifier passing does NOT protect a sub-0.3%-ATR name from immediate noise-stop. NOTE this is an OBSERVATION not yet an active_parameter_adjustment (only 3-4 samples; needs >=10 before it goes in the adjustments list) -- but it is the single most repeated, most costly mechanical pattern in the record and should weigh on entry selection now. (c) FILL-RECONCILIATION BUG BIT AGAIN (3rd time: MPC, CIEN, now WDC): WDC's protective stop self-filled at 12:37 PM but was NEVER written to trade_log.jsonl; place_order at EOD correctly refused to sell into a flat broker (would have opened a short) and logged a RECONCILE event, then I reconstructed the EXIT from Alpaca order history (stop id fce44a63...). If any future stop fills before an agent runs, ALWAYS reconcile broker order history into trade_log before update_memory -- otherwise the loss is invisible to the memory system. This bug is unfixed in code and recurring; consider prioritizing a fix. (d) REGIME: green tape Friday, VIX easing under 20, SPY trending_up but EMA spread razor-thin -- not strong-trend confirmation. If Monday opens green again, the cluster (storage/semi/data-center) is worth re-scanning, but apply the atr_pct widen-or-skip lesson before pulling the trigger. If it opens red/choppy, default back to cash discipline -- the selectivity edge is still the only thing keeping cumulative alpha positive (+2.27pts vs SPY).
